titleStmt.title: SII 31.113: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 113. (A.R. No. B 289 of 1938.) UPPALŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the front of Chanḍēśvarī temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1475, Pramādīcha, Māgha ba. 11, Corresponding to January 29, Monday, 1554 A.D.

Registers the gift of Vipravinōdi paṁnu (tax collected from Vipravinōdins) by Sāḷuva Gōvindayya, son of Vipravinōdi Pedda Gōvindayya of Kāśyapa gōtra, Āpastaṁba sūtra and yajus-sākha and China Gōparāju, son of Ma[la*]yālapu Gōparāju, for maintaining the worship and perpetual lamp to the god Mādhavēśvara at Vuppalūru alias Dēvarāja samudramu in conjunction of the mahājanas of Vuppalūru for the merit of the members of their community and other stationed at different places (Kēśavayya of Chenūru, Parvvatayya of Chāṁgala maṛi; Padmābhatta Vallabhayya stationed in the Turushakarājya; Gajavipravenōdi Kēśavayya stationed at Vōḍerajya i.e., Ōḍarājya and others).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
va¨rṣaṁbulu 1475 Agunēṭi pramādīcasaṁ
vatsara māgha ba 11 puṇyakālamaṁdu śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadā
sivadēva mahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhvī sāmṇrājyaṁ sēyu
cuṁḍagānu vudayagiri rājyānaku cellēghaṁ
ḍikōṭaku Ājñēyabhāgamaṁdu vuppalūriki
pratināmamaIna dēvarāyasamudraṁ Agrahāraṁ
mādhavēśvaradēvuniki kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁba sū
traṁ yajuśmākhādhyāyulaIna vipravinōdipeda gō
viṁdayyakoḍuku sāḷuva gōviṁdayyānumala
yālapu gōparājukoḍuku cinagōparājunnu ja
sa 2 nu yēkastusthula tamavipravinōdikulaṁvāru ce
nūrikēśavaya cāṁgalamaṟi parvataya turukhā
rājyānavuṁna padmābhaṭla vallabhayya vōḍe rājyāna vu
ṁna gajavipravinōdi kēśavayyakuṁṭi vallabhayya ko
ḍuku Anutayya Allāḍayya koḍuku mādhavayya
maṁtramū¨rti basavayya dakṣiṇāmū¨rtti varada
ya lakṣmaya vīrumudalugāṁgaligina vipravinō
dikulaṁ vārikellānu puṇyaṁgānu vuppalūri mādha
vēśvaradēvuniki vuppalūri mahājanālu Ēṭa vripavinō
dapaṁnu vuppalūri mādhavēśvaradēvuniki Amṛtapa
ḷakunnu dīpārādhanakunnu dhāravōśi Istimi . trivācakaṁ
gānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāIgānu dhāravōsi Istimi . yīdha
rmānaku yavvaru tappinānu gaṁgakaruta gōbrāṁha
lavadhiṁcina pāpāna bōInavāru . tamatallidaṁdrā
dula vāraṇāsilōna vadhiṁcina dōṣāna bōIna
vāru śunakamāṁsamunu surāpānamunu śēviṁci
sa pāpāna bōInavāru Anivēśina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ .
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattā
paharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayō
¨rmadhyē dānāccrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rgga
mahāpnōti pālanāducyutaṁpadaṁ .
engraved in Tamil Script
Digital edition of SII 31.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
